payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial crop of a dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair with curved vertical spindle-back slats and a light beige upholstered seat; the front seat edge and leg are cut off at the image border, the wood has a polished finish with some visible wear on the seat edge, and the chair appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark wooden spindle-back chair (partial)","long_description":"Partial crop of a dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair with curved vertical spindle-back slats and a light beige upholstered seat; the front seat edge and leg are cut off at the image border, the wood has a polished finish with some visible wear on the seat edge, and the chair appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).","attributes":["dark reddish-brown wood","spindle-back with vertical slats","light beige upholstered seat","edge-cropped / partial","polished finish","visible wear on seat edge","dining chair scale"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
